headline: International Business Machines (IBM) Is Up 15.8% After Announcing $2 Billion Anderon Quantum Chip Foundry Partnership
summary: Earlier this week, IBM and the U.S. Department of Commerce announced a Letter of Intent to create Anderon, America’s first pure-play quantum chip foundry in Albany, New York, backed by US$1.00 billion in CHIPS incentives and a matching US$1.00 billion cash commitment from IBM plus intellectual property and staff. This partnership not only cements IBM’s role at the core of the U.S. quantum ecosystem but also creates a dedicated 300‑millimeter quantum wafer facility intended to supply multiple...

headline: Rigetti Computing (RGTI) Soars 19.9% on $100M Govt Funding
summary: Rigetti Computing Inc. (NASDAQ:RGTI) is one of the 10 Stocks Effortlessly Climbing Double-Digits. Rigetti Computing rallied for a third consecutive day on Friday, climbing 19.87 percent to close at $26.42 apiece, as investors took heart from its $100-million financial backing from the US government. headline: The AI Stock Retirees Are Adding to Their Portfolios -- and Growth Investors Should, Too
summary: IBM is a reliable AI compounder, pairing real enterprise AI growth with one of the strongest dividend track records in large-cap tech.
